faqs.question: How much does the Pro plan cost?
faqs.answer_markdown: The **Pro plan** is $49/month per seat, billed annually, or $59 month-to-month.

faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer_markdown: Full refunds within **30 days** of purchase, no questions asked. Email billing@acme.example.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer_markdown: Use **Forgot password** on the sign-in page. Reset links expire after 1 hour.
